Records.authors: Groote, S., Korner, J.G., Pivovarov, A.A.
Records.description: One-loop sunrise (bubble) self-energy with two arbitrary internal masses m1, m2 in D=2 Euclidean space-time, evaluated via configuration-space (Bessel-moment) representation S(1,1) = (1/2pi) int_0^infty J_0(p x) K_0(m1 x) K_0(m2 x) dx. The paper numerically verifies the IBP recurrence relation 2 m1^2 S(2,1) + (p^2+m1^2+m2^2) S(1,2) = S(1,1) + S(0,2) (Eq. recur12), Euler's homogeneity differential equation (Eq. euler), and Remiddi's second-order DE (Eq. remiddi1) for S(1,1). Higher-index integrals S(2,1), S(1,2) are obtained as mass derivatives of S(1,1) and expressed as Bessel-moment integrals.
Records.location: Section 3, Eqs. (10)-(20); recurrence relations Eqs. (recur1)-(recur3); differential equation Eqs. (euler), (remiddi1)
